content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Palindromic Twist". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1027/A
constraints: S consists of lowercase English letters
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case contains a string S of length N.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of operations required to make the string a palindrome.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Compare characters from the start and end of the string, moving towards the center.
